mapper.insert: INSERT INTO theater_facility ( mt10id, fcltynm, mt13cnt, seatscale, telno, relateurl, adres, la, lo ) VALUES ( #{mt10id}, #{fcltynm}, #{mt13cnt}, #{seatscale}, #{telno}, #{relateurl}, #{adres}, #{la}, #{lo} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE fcltynm = VALUES(fcltynm), mt13cnt = VALUES(mt13cnt), seatscale = VALUES(seatscale), telno = VALUES(telno), relateurl = VALUES(relateurl), adres = VALUES(adres), la = VALUES(la), lo = VALUES(lo), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO performance ( mt20id, prfnm, mt10id, prfpdfrom, prfpdto, prfcast, prfruntime, prfage, pcseguidance, poster, sty, genrenm, updatedate, prfstate, dtguidance ) VALUES ( #{mt20id}, #{prfnm}, #{mt10id}, #{prfpdfrom}, #{prfpdto}, #{prfcast}, #{prfruntime}, #{prfage}, #{pcseguidance}, #{poster}, #{sty}, #{genrenm}, #{updatedate}, #{prfstate}, #{dtguidance} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE prfnm = VALUES(prfnm), mt10id = VALUES(mt10id), prfpdfrom = VALUES(prfpdfrom), prfpdto = VALUES(prfpdto), prfcast = VALUES(prfcast), prfruntime = VALUES(prfruntime), prfage = VALUES(prfage), pcseguidance = VALUES(pcseguidance), poster = VALUES(poster), sty = VALUES(sty), genrenm = VALUES(genrenm), updatedate = VALUES(updatedate), prfstate = VALUES(prfstate), dtguidance = VALUES(dtguidance), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
INSERT INTO performance_relate (mt20id, relatenm, relateurl) VALUES (#{mt20id}, #{relatenm}, #{relateurl})
